title: AI Revolution: Keep Your Business Ahead, Securely.
description: Address the significant challenge: how to deploy advanced AI tools securely and responsibly.
h1: AI Revolution: Keep Your Business Ahead, Securely.
html:
Introduction:

Artificial Intelligence (AI) has transitioned from a futuristic concept to an essential tool for a modern business. However, as businesses rush to embrace this technology, they face a significant challenge: how to deploy advanced AI tools securely and responsibly.

Understanding the Challenge

Generative AI is no longer a futuristic concept; it’s a current reality. Many companies want to equip their teams with these powerful tools. However, deploying these Generative AI tools securely and with manageable risk to every employee in a business is complex. Due to these complexities, instead of leveraging this technology, the response for many organizations has been to outright ban generative AI.

“More than 60% of organisations in the UK have either banned, or are considering banning, the use of generative AI tools on employee- or business-owned devices”

Source: ComputerWeekly.com Many UK organisations considering ChatGPT bans on employee devices

This avoidance often backfires, leading employees to use AI tools outside enterprise security and control parameters, which can escalate risks even further.

“Some 28% of respondents to the online poll on artificial intelligence (AI) between July 11 and 17 said they regularly use ChatGPT at work, while only 22% said their employers explicitly allowed such external tools.”

Source: Reuters – ChatGPT fever spreads to US workplace, sounding alarm for some

The Need for a New Solution

Leading AI vendors have overlooked the imperative of seamlessly integrating Generative AI into business operations, revealing a glaring market gap. Current offerings limit businesses to single-vendor LLMs, bringing with them the inherent risks of any one-vendor approach. In today’s fast-paced digital age, businesses shouldn’t have to choose between security and productivity or be shackled by vendor limitations. That’s where SkyDeck.ai steps in.

Introducing SkyDeck.ai

Enter SkyDeck.ai, a secure, business-first AI productivity platform designed to deploy generative AI to everyone in an organization, enhancing creativity and productivity. This platform is architected with robust security features, giving businesses the confidence to maintain control, monitor use, protect data, enable collaboration, and avoid vendor lock-in—ultimately harnessing more power with less risk.

SkyDeck.ai: Your Secure Solution

Here’s where SkyDeck.ai comes to the rescue. This platform is built to deploy generative AI across an entire organization safely. It’s designed to supercharge creativity and productivity. Plus, SkyDeck.ai ensures businesses retain full control, continuously monitor usage, and protect sensitive data.

Tailored for Business Needs

From start-ups to large enterprises, SkyDeck.ai caters to businesses of all sizes. It’s not just about deploying AI; it’s about doing so in a way that aligns with your specific needs and security requirements. No vendor lock-in. More power, less risk.

Unlock Collaboration, Not Just Tools

SkyDeck.ai doesn’t just bring AI to your business. It also facilitates seamless, secure collaboration among teams. Employees can jointly build a context, work on a project, and invite others—all within a protected environment.

The SkyDeck.ai Advantage

As an interactive front-end for your LLMs (Large Language Models), SkyDeck.ai stands apart from the rest. It’s more than a platform; it’s a transformative solution that prepares your business for the future of AI—without the security headaches.

Your Path to a Secure AI Future

In a rapidly evolving landscape, standing still is not an option. With SkyDeck.ai, your business doesn’t just keep up—it stays ahead. Securely.

Ready to explore what SkyDeck.ai can do for your organization? Start your journey today.
